episodes.title: Can Jobs Feel Cult-Like? How to Spot an Unhealthy Workplace Culture.
episodes.description:
Have you ever worked somewhere that said “we’re a family,” but somehow that started to feel more like pressure than support?

In this episode, I’m talking about how certain workplace cultures can start to feel cult-like...not because people are bad, but because the environment begins to blur the lines between your identity, your loyalty, your health, and your work.

This conversation is not about becoming cynical or detached. It’s about learning how to show up to work with clarity, confidence, and boundaries — without losing yourself in the process.

Your work can be meaningful without becoming your identity.

XX,
Nikki
